UAE Strategic Advisory

CFO Advisory (Part-Time)

Strategic financial guidance from experienced CFOs on a flexible, part-time basis. Get senior-level financial expertise without the cost of a full-time executive.

Get a QuoteBook Consultation

Senior-Level Expertise, Fractional Cost

Many growing businesses need CFO-level strategic guidance but cannot justify the cost of a full-time executive. Our part-time CFO service provides you with experienced financial leaders on a flexible basis, giving you access to senior expertise when you need it.

Our CFO advisors have decades of combined experience across various industries in the UAE and internationally. They understand the unique challenges of UAE businesses and provide practical, actionable strategic guidance.

Ideal For

  • Growing SMEs needing strategic guidance
  • Companies preparing for investment or exit
  • Businesses entering new markets
  • Organizations requiring financial restructuring
  • Companies needing board-level financial representation
  • Businesses with complex financial operations

Our CFO Advisory Services

Strategic Planning

Development and execution of financial strategies aligned with business objectives and market opportunities.

Financial Modeling

Complex financial modeling for business planning, investment analysis, M&A, and scenario planning.

Board Representation

Professional representation at board meetings providing financial insights and strategic recommendations.

Risk Management

Identification and mitigation of financial risks including liquidity, market, and operational risks.

Performance Optimization

Analysis of business performance and implementation of strategies to improve profitability and efficiency.

Fundraising Support

Assistance with fundraising including investor presentations, due diligence support, and deal negotiation.

Flexible Engagement Models

Monthly Retainer

Fixed monthly retainer for ongoing advisory with regular meetings and continuous support.

Hours: Flexible hours per month
Best For: Ongoing strategic guidance

Project-Based

Fixed fee for specific projects such as fundraising, financial restructuring, or M&A support.

Hours: Project duration
Best For: Specific initiatives

Ad-Hoc

Pay-as-you-go for specific advisory needs without long-term commitment.

Hours: Hourly billing
Best For: Occasional advisory needs

Transparent Pricing

Advisory

AED 4,999/mo

For businesses requiring monthly CFO advisory

  • Monthly strategy calls
  • Financial review meetings
  • Strategic planning support
  • Board meeting attendance
  • Email support
Most Popular

Strategic

AED 8,999/mo

For businesses requiring comprehensive CFO support

  • Everything in Advisory
  • Financial modeling
  • Fundraising support
  • Investor presentations
  • Priority support
  • Weekly check-ins

Executive

AED 14,999/mo

For businesses requiring full-time equivalent support

  • Everything in Strategic
  • On-site presence as needed
  • Team leadership
  • M&A support
  • 24/7 availability
  • Dedicated CFO advisor

*All prices exclude 5% UAE VAT

Frequently Asked Questions

How much time does a part-time CFO dedicate?

This depends on your needs. Our engagements range from 5-10 hours per month for advisory support to 20+ hours for strategic projects. We customize the engagement to your requirements.

What qualifications do your CFO advisors have?

Our CFO advisors have extensive experience including CFO roles at multinational corporations, Big 4 background, and UAE market expertise. They hold professional qualifications including ACCA, CA, CPA, and CFA.

Can you help with fundraising?

Yes. We have extensive experience helping UAE businesses raise capital from VCs, private equity, and strategic investors. We prepare investor materials, support due diligence, and assist with deal negotiation.

Do you work with specific industries?

We have experience across all major UAE industries including technology, real estate, healthcare, retail, manufacturing, and professional services. Our advisors have sector-specific expertise.

Strategic Financial Leadership

Get senior-level financial expertise on a flexible, cost-effective basis.
